# `aube prefix`

- **Usage**: `aube prefix [-g --global]`

Print the current package prefix directory

## Flags

### `-g --global`

Print the global prefix directory instead of the project's root

Examples:

  $ aube prefix
  /home/user/project

  $ aube prefix -g
  /home/user/.local/share/pnpm
